{| class="wikitable" style="width:100%; margin-top:1.5em; font-size:90%"
! colspan="2" style="font-size:105%" | [[:Category:Traveler's Gate|Traveler's Gate]]
|-
| style="white-space:nowrap" | '''Books''' || [[House of Blades (novel)|House of Blades]] • [[The Crimson Vault (novel)|The Crimson Vault]] • [[City of Light (novel)|City of Light]]
|-
| '''Magic''' || [[Traveling and the Territories]]
|-
| '''Browse''' || [[:Category:Traveler's Gate characters|Characters]] • [[:Category:Traveler's Gate locations|Locations]] • [[:Category:Traveler's Gate groups|Groups]] • [[:Category:Traveler's Gate events|Events]] • [[:Category:Traveler's Gate|Everything]]
|}
